About Me

Hi! Thanks for checking out my website! I’m a sophomore in high school, and I enjoy playing music, working with technology, and playing tennis. I play jazz piano as well as trombone. When it comes to technology, I love to create cool projects, discover new apps or websites, and work with audio and lighting equipment. I plan to use this website to show some cool things I make or ideas that I have, so check back every once in a while for something new!
